description: New for this season, the LiteTrace series of backpacks are designed for maximum performance on the trails in lightweight, comfortable silhouettes. The LiteTrace Hydration Pack has a three-liter water bladder with a tube that can exit on either the left or right side. Made entirely from recycled plastic that has been repurposed into ripstop fabric, the bag's durability is much enhanced keeping it safe from branches and rocky boulders. Water-resistant, this backpack has quick-adjust shoulder and sternum straps for optimal Fit and weight distribution, tricot-lined media pockets and also includes a rain cover.Height: 55cmWidth: 21.5cmDepth: 33 cmCapacity: 27 litresMade with 50% recycled fibers like polyester and wool, to help reduce environment impact Fabrics and back panel are specially designed to promote air flow and channel moisture away from the body for superior moisture controlAluminium stabiliser bar for firm grip on the shouldersFront haul handle to pull with easeExterior bungee system for easy trekkingInternal mesh pockets to store soiled laundryExternal stretch and adjustable pocket Polypropylene webbing to make the pack water resistantWaterproof rain cover in a zipper at the bottomQuick adjust shoulder straps with sternum straps for durabilityTricot lined media pocket with portCareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
